ddls:
CREATE TABLE "game_strategies" (
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game strategy */,
  "weight_holes" REAL /* Weight assigned to the number of holes in the game */,
  "weight_height" REAL /* Weight assigned to the height of the game board */,
  "weight_bumpiness" REAL /* Weight assigned to the bumpiness of the game board */,
  "weight_line_clear" REAL /* Weight assigned to the number of lines cleared */,
  "weight_hollow_columns" REAL /* Weight assigned to the number of hollow columns */,
  "weight_row_transition" REAL /* Weight assigned to the number of row transitions */,
  "weight_col_transition" REAL /* Weight assigned to the number of column transitions */,
  "weight_pit_count" REAL /* Weight assigned to the number of pits */,
  "weight_to_consider" TEXT /* Weights to consider in the strategy (JSON array of feature indices) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the strategy */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the strategy was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the strategy was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the strategy */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* A flag to indicate if the strategy is public or private */,
  "views" INTEGER /* The number of times the strategy has been viewed */,
  "downloads" INTEGER /* The number of times the strategy has been downloaded */,
  "rating_average" REAL /* The average rating of the strategy */,
  "rating_count" INTEGER /* The number of ratings the strategy has received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strategy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_strategies_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., player, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* User's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* User's last name */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* A short bio or description about the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* User's location */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* User's birthdate */,
  "is_verified" INTEGER /* A flag to indicate if the user is verified */,
  "followers_count" INTEGER /* The number of followers the user has */,
  "following_count" INTEGER /* The number of users the user is following */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who played the game */,
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the strategy used during the game session */,
  "final_score" INTEGER /* Final score achieved in the game session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the game session started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the game session ended */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the game session in seconds */,
  "level" INTEGER /* The level of the game session */,
  "lines_cleared" INTEGER /* The total number of lines cleared in the session */,
  "pieces_placed" INTEGER /* The total number of pieces placed in the session */,
  "max_height" INTEGER /* The maximum height reached on the game board */,
  "min_height" INTEGER /* The minimum height reached on the game board */,
  "average_height" REAL /* The average height of the game board during the session */,
  "game_mode" TEXT /* The mode of the game (e.g., classic, marathon, sprint) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_sessions_strategy_id FOREIGN KEY ("strategy_id") REFERENCES game_strategies ("strategy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing the feedback */,
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the strategy being reviewed */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5 scale) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment provided by the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feedback was created */,
  "is_helpful" INTEGER /* A flag to indicate if the feedback is marked as helpful */,
  "helpful_count" INTEGER /* The number of times the feedback has been marked as helpful */,
  "is_flagged" INTEGER /* A flag to indicate if the feedback is flagged for review */,
  "flag_reason" TEXT /* The reason for flagging the feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_strategy_id FOREIGN KEY ("strategy_id") REFERENCES game_strategies ("strategy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leaderboard" (
  "leaderboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leaderboard entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who achieved the score */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game session where the score was achieved */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Final score achieved */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the score was recorded */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* The rank of the user on the leaderboard */,
  "strategy_name" TEXT /* The name of the strategy used to achieve the score */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* A flag to indicate if the score is active (e.g., not deleted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leaderboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leaderboard_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leaderboard_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES game_sessions ("session_id")
)
